doc_title: Scaling Advantage in Approximate Optimization with Quantum Annealing

items.fact: Parallel tempering with isoenergetic cluster moves (PT-ICM) is referenced in [17]
items.evidence_span: parallel tempering with isoenergetic cluster moves (PT-ICM) [17]

items.fact: Quantum annealing correction (QAC) is referenced in [18]
items.evidence_span: quantum annealing correction (QAC) [18]
generalization of the time-to-solution metric [8]
with an optimality gap [19]
fast, coherent anneals lasting on the order of the single superconducting flux qubit coherence time [20,21]
this diabatic approach is considered promising [22]

items.fact: Hamiltonian quantum computation models are referenced in [23-28]
items.evidence_span: Hamiltonian quantum computation models [23-28]

items.fact: Fault-tolerance threshold theorem is referenced in [29]
items.evidence_span: absence of a fault-tolerance threshold theorem [29]

items.fact: Adiabatic quantum computation is referenced in [30-36]
items.evidence_span: related model of adiabatic quantum computation [30-36]
even as new devices have started to emerge [16, 37-39]

items.fact: Analog control problem is referenced in [18,40,41]
items.evidence_span: mitigate the analog control problem [18,40,41]

items.fact: Energy gap and tunneling barriers are referenced in [42]
items.evidence_span: increase the energy gap of the encoded Hamiltonian and reduce tunneling barriers [42]
unless P=NP [43,44]
K. L. Pudenz, T. Albash, and D. A. Lidar, Errorcorrected quantum annealing with hundreds of qubits, $\mathrm{Na}-$ ture Communications 5, 3243 (2014).
T. F. Ronnow, Z. Wang, J. Job, S. Boixo, S. V. Isakov, D. Wecker, J. M. Martinis, D. A. Lidar, and M. Troyer, Defining and detecting quantum speedup, Science 345, 420 (2014).
Z. Zhu, A. J. Ochoa, and H. G. Katzgraber, Efficient Cluster Algorithm for Spin Glasses in Any Space Dimension, Physical Review Letters 115, 077201 (2015).
Gurobi Optimization: MIPGap.

A. D. King, S. Suzuki, J. Raymond, A. Zucca, T. Lanting, F. Altomare, A. J. Berkley, S. Ejtemaee, E. Hoskinson, S. Huang, E. Ladizinsky, A. J. R. MacDonald, G. Marsden, T. Oh, G. Poulin-Lamarre, M. Reis, C. Rich, Y. Sato, J. D. Whittaker, J. Yao, R. Harris, D. A. Lidar, H. Nishimori, and M. H. Amin, Coherent quantum annealing in a programmable 2,000 qubit Ising chain, Nature Physics 18,1324 (2022).

A. D. King, J. Raymond, T. Lanting, R. Harris, A. Zucca, F. Altomare, A. J. Berkley, K. Boothby, S. Ejtemaee, C. Enderud, E. Hoskinson, S. Huang, E. Ladizinsky, A. J. R. MacDonald, G. Marsden, R. Molavi, T. Oh, G. Poulin-Lamarre, M. Reis, C. Rich, Y. Sato, N. Tsai, M. Volkmann, J. D. Whittaker, J. Yao, A. W. Sandvik, and M. H. Amin, Quantum critical dynamics in a 5,000qubit programmable spin glass, Nature 617, 61 (2023).

items.fact: The QAC encoding introduced in Ref. [18] is implemented.
items.evidence_span: We implement the $[[3,1,3]]_{1}$ QAC encoding introduced in Ref. [18]
The significant reduction in μ suggests that in addition to J-chaos suppression, diabatic error suppression by QAC is responsible for the improved TTε and shorter optimal annealing times.
